pull_requests.title: Catalog sync filter update for active SKU projection
pull_requests.description: Refined inventory catalog projection filters and adjusted SKU lookup timeout to improve throughput.
pull_requests.author: erin
pull_requests.suspected_breaking_change: Filtered out PREORDER SKUs from active projection and lowered inventory query timeout from 3000ms to 1200ms.
pull_requests.suggested_fix: Restore PREORDER inclusion where required, roll back aggressive timeout, and validate catalog projection integrity before rollout.

files.summary: Changed active projection filter from ACTIVE+PREORDER to ACTIVE only.
Reduced inventory query timeout from 3000ms to 1200ms.

pull_requests.title: Harden JWT expiration and JWKS cache refresh
pull_requests.description: Tightened JWT expiration checks and shortened JWKS cache TTL for faster key rotation response.
pull_requests.author: frank
pull_requests.suspected_breaking_change: Set clock skew to zero and reduced JWKS cache TTL, increasing token expiry rejections during minor clock drift.
pull_requests.suggested_fix: Reintroduce reasonable clock skew tolerance and tune JWKS cache refresh cadence to avoid auth spikes.

files.summary: Reduced clock skew tolerance and changed token expiry rejection path.

pull_requests.title: Reduce order DB command timeout and add retry policy
pull_requests.description: Refactored OrderReadRepository timeout defaults from 3000ms to 1500ms and introduced retry policy for transient failures.
pull_requests.author: alice
pull_requests.suspected_breaking_change: Lowered DB statement timeout from 3000ms to 1500ms while increasing retry attempts.
pull_requests.suggested_fix: Restore timeout closer to 3000ms, cap retries, and add jittered backoff to reduce pool pressure.

files.summary: Lowered command timeout and wrapped query execution with retry helper.
Changed pool wait timeout and max connection settings.

pull_requests.title: Tune payment provider client concurrency and retry backoff
pull_requests.description: Updated payment provider integration with parallel request fan-out, retry-after handling, and circuit breaker thresholds.
pull_requests.author: bob
pull_requests.suspected_breaking_change: Increased provider concurrency to 60 and replaced Retry-After based sleep with fixed 200ms.
pull_requests.suggested_fix: Honor provider Retry-After headers, reduce in-flight calls, and tune retry policy to avoid 429 storms.

files.summary: Increased concurrency from 20 to 60 and changed retry policy.
Adjusted circuit breaker from 50% to 35% failure threshold.

pull_requests.title: Gateway timeout budget normalization
pull_requests.description: Adjusted gateway upstream timeout defaults and aligned route-level budgets.
pull_requests.author: carol

files.summary: Changed default upstream timeout to 2s for checkout and orders routes.
Updated route-level timeout values and retry limits.

pull_requests.title: Inventory cache fallback refactor
pull_requests.description: Reworked cache miss fallback flow to always call primary datastore after redis timeout.
pull_requests.author: dave

files.summary: Added fallback DB fetch path with new timeout constant.
